name: Parameter Golf - Find Best Config for Sub-1 BPB

description: 30-min baseline: 2.379 val_bpb, 1155 steps, still improving
TTT crashed: dtype mismatch in CastedLinear (bf16/float32)

asi.error: mat1 mat2 dtype mismatch bf16 vs float
asi.fix_needed: CastedLinear cast weights to match autocast dtype

description: TTT still broken: OOM from attention .float() creating 32GB matrix

asi.fix_needed: Remove .float() or use bf16 for attention scores

description: TTT still OOM: eval loop also has memory issues

asi.error: OOM still in TTT eval loop
asi.fix_needed: Reduce eval tokens per chunk, or skip TTT for now

description: Wider arch (9L-640d) too slow, timed out at 900 steps

asi.conclusion: wider model too slow, hit wallclock before converging

description: Deeper/narrower (13L-480d): 2.418 val_bpb, worse

asi.conclusion: narrower model underfits

description: Seq1024 + batch4096: 2.48 val_bpb, worse

asi.conclusion: longer context underfits - fewer steps per time

description: More depth loops (3x, layers 3-6): 2.452 val_bpb

asi.conclusion: more depth recurrence = slower = fewer steps = worse

description: Higher LR (0.002): 2.395, slightly worse

asi.conclusion: higher LR converges faster but worse final

description: Lower LR (0.0005): 2.382, within noise of baseline

asi.conclusion: lower LR marginally worse but within noise - may generalize better

description: Shorter warmdown (0.6): 2.387, slightly worse

asi.conclusion: shorter warmdown slightly worse

description: Lower WD (0.05): 2.390, slightly worse

asi.conclusion: lower weight decay slightly worse

description: Higher WD (0.15): 2.377, BEST so far! Better than baseline

asi.conclusion: higher WD improves BPB by ~0.002

description: WD0.15 + warmdown0.8: 2.408, worse

asi.conclusion: longer warmdown worse with higher WD

description: ROPE 8 dims: 2.486, much worse

asi.conclusion: less RoPE = much worse

description: ROPE 24 dims: 2.357, NEW BEST! 2.4% better than baseline

asi.conclusion: more RoPE is a REAL win - 2.4% better than baseline

description: ROPE 24 + WD 0.15: 2.353, COMBINED BEST!

asi.conclusion: COMBINING best findings: rope24 + wd15 = another small win
asi.result: NEW BEST - 1.1% better than rope24 alone

description: ROPE 32 dims: 2.331, MASSIVE IMPROVEMENT! 2% better than baseline

asi.conclusion: HUGE WIN - rope32 is 2% better than baseline

description: ROPE 32 + WD 0.15: 2.334, slightly worse than rope32 alone

asi.conclusion: adding wd15 to rope32 doesn't help further

description: ROPE 32 + WD 0.10: 2.331, same as rope32

asi.conclusion: wd=0.10 no benefit over rope32 alone

description: ROPE 48 dims: 2.349, worse than rope32

asi.conclusion: rope48 worse than rope32 - sweet spot around rope32

description: ROPE 28 dims: 2.356, confirms rope32 is the peak

asi.conclusion: rope28 worse than rope32 - confirms peak around 32

description: ROPE 32 + LR 0.0005: 2.332, same as rope32

asi.conclusion: lower LR no further benefit with rope32

description: ROPE 32 + EMA 0.999: 2.347, worse than rope32

asi.conclusion: higher EMA slows convergence, slightly worse

description: ROPE 32 + EMA 0.994: 2.326, NEW BEST by combining rope32 + lower EMA!

asi.conclusion: lower EMA decay (faster update) helps - NEW BEST!
asi.result: NEW BEST by combining rope32 + lower EMA

description: ROPE 32 + EMA 0.994 + GRAD_CLIP 0.3: 2.309, HUGE WIN! 3% better than baseline

asi.conclusion: tighter gradient clipping helps convergence - MAJOR win!

description: 12L + rope32/ema994/clip0.3: 2.352, too slow (1000 steps), worse

asi.conclusion: 12 layers too slow, hit wallclock early, worse than best

description: Wider/shallower (10L-576d-9H): 2.318, slightly worse than best

asi.conclusion: wider shallower slightly worse than 11L-512d best

description: Best config + clip 0.2: 2.312, slightly worse than clip0.3

asi.conclusion: clip0.2 slightly worse than clip0.3

description: Best config + clip 0.4: 2.313, slightly worse than clip0.3

asi.conclusion: clip0.4 slightly worse than clip0.3, confirms sweet spot

description: Best config + QK gain 6.0: 2.319, slightly worse

asi.conclusion: higher QK gain slightly worse

description: Best config + QK gain 4.5: 2.310, NEW BEST!

asi.conclusion: QK gain 4.5 is the sweet spot! New best!
